title: Path and command references
input: check the deploy script at /opt/deploy/deploy.sh. run pnpm build and then pnpm start. the log file is at /var/log/app.log. just review what it does.

requiredConstraints: check the deploy script at /opt/deploy/deploy.sh. run pnpm build and then pnpm start. the log file is at /var/log/app.log. just review what it does.
forbiddenAdditions: Do not run pnpm build, pnpm start, or the deploy script.
Do not alter files under /opt/deploy or /var/log.
